column1: # Publishes the pfam-annogroups X orthogroups integration deliverables
# (non-bilaterian-only focus). Source globs are relative to this manifest's
# Build with (from the integrator subproject root):
# This is a COPYME template (single source of truth). The discovery helper
# ignores manifests in workflow-COPYME-* dirs; copy this file into the
# canonical workflow-RUN_* dir for it to publish (per gigantic_conventions §38/§39).
# ----- Headline deliverables: the two integration tables -----

column6: One row per kept pfam annogroup (annogroups with at least one non-bilaterian-only orthogroup). Reports all of the annogroup's orthogroups (non-bilaterian-only / bilaterian-only / mixed) with per-class counts and ID lists, plus the annogroup's pfam accessions and definitions.

One row per orthogroup whose member species contain no bilaterian (every member is a non-bilaterian metazoan or a non-metazoan outgroup). Columns: member protein count, species count, and the non-bilaterian species list.

Every orthogroup classified bilaterian_only / non_bilaterian_only / mixed against the Bilateria (C103) species set, with bilaterian and non-bilaterian species counts. The shared basis for Tables 1 and 2.
Fail-fast validation cross-checks (composition-class validity, Table 2 count, Table 1 arithmetic and referential integrity, and the keep-rule). Status PASS means every cross-check held.
